articles.author: Rebecca Rubin
articles.title: Box Office: 'Super Mario Galaxy Movie' Scores $68 Million in Second Weekend - Variety
articles.description: Universal's animated "The Super Mario Galaxy Movie" scored again in its second weekend, collecting $69 million from 4,284 North American theaters.
articles.content: Universal’s animated sequel “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie” remained No. 1 at the domestic box office, collecting $69 million from 4,284 North American theaters in its second weekend of release. Those… [+3759 chars]

articles.author: Emma Caplan-Fisher
articles.title: Bessent and Powell call emergency meeting with bank CEOs after Anthropic's Mythos AI finds thousands of zero-day exploits - moneywise.com
articles.description: The model found a 27-year-old flaw in one of the world's most secure operating systems. Now regulators want the biggest banks in America to get ready for what comes next.
